name: White Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Instant Chicken Bouillon OR 4 cubes Chicken Bouillion
3 medium Cucumbers, peeled and seeded, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the cucumbers. Cut them into cubes to yield about 3 cups of cubes.
2. In a small saucepan, dissolve the bouillon in boiling water. Allow it to cool completely.
3. In a blender or food processor, blend the cucumber cubes with half a cup of bouillon liquid until smooth.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the cucumber mixture, remaining bouillon liquid, sour cream, lemon juice, garlic powder, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Chill thoroughly.
6. Garnish as desired and serve with condiments. Refrigerate leftovers.
